Fetch a vector of values from GitHub GraphQL API using a builder function

Source: R/utils-gh.R
FetchVectorFromGQL.Rd

Fetch a vector of values from GitHub GraphQL API using a builder function

Usage

FetchVectorFromGQL(
  x,
  fnBuildQuery,
  vecProto = integer(),
  intBatchSize = 50,
  strOwner = GetGHOwner(),
  strRepo = GetGHRepo(),
  strGHToken = gh::gh_token()
)

Arguments

x

(vector) A vector of inputs to process.

fnBuildQuery

(function) A function that takes a single element of x and returns a character string representing a GraphQL sub-query for that element.

vecProto

(vector) A prototype vector to return if x is empty.

strOwner

(length-1 character) GitHub username or organization name.

strRepo

(length-1 character) GitHub repository name.

strGHToken

(length-1 character) GitHub token with permissions appropriate to the action being performed.

Value

A sorted, unique vector of values fetched from GitHub, or vecProto.

On this page

Developed by Jeremy Wildfire, Jon Harmon, Natalia Andriychuk, Matt Roumaya.
